top_signals.title: Cargo thieves are following the AI boom
top_signals.summary:
The AI boom is changing more than technology. It is reshaping supply chains, increasing demand for critical components and creating a new class of high-value cargo targets. The question is not whether criminals are paying attention. It is how quickly the transportation industry can adapt.

The post Cargo thieves are following the AI boom appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SpaceX drops more than 4% following $400 billion sell-off
top_signals.summary: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tech rout intensifies as sell-off grips global stocks
top_signals.summary: Global stocks sold off on Tuesday, led by deep losses for tech stocks following a losing session for the sector on Wall Street.
